summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Orcabet's major updates - real casino roulette system, pack picking mechanism, leaderboard filtering, admin balance management, and 100 coin starting balance. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 98% functional with excellent integration.
passed_tests: Backend: All 19 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Real casino roulette: POST /api/roulette/play with bet_type=number/color/parity/half/dozen
Roulette response format: result_number, result_color, won, multiplier, winnings
3 spins per day limit functioning with GET /api/roulette/status
Pack system: POST /api/packs/buy returns pack_id + cards (pending state)
Pack picking: POST /api/packs/pick saves ONLY selected card to user collection
Leaderboard: GET /api/users/leaderboard excludes admin users, sorted by total_cards
Admin users: GET /api/admin/users shows non-admin users with balance and card count
Admin balance: POST /api/admin/add-balance/{user_id} increases user balance successfully
Registration: New users receive exactly 100 coins (not 1000)
Frontend: User registration and authentication with 100 coin balance display
Frontend: Real casino roulette UI with clickable number grid (0-36)
Frontend: All outside bets functional - red/black/par/impar/dozens/halves
Frontend: Roulette wheel animation and spin button triggering properly
Frontend: Pack opening dialog with card reveal and selection mechanism
Frontend: Shop page allows pack purchase followed by mandatory card selection
Frontend: Leaderboard page excludes admin users and shows card counts
Frontend: Admin page 'Usuarios' tab with 'Ingresar' balance buttons functional
Frontend: Admin balance addition dialog and confirmation working
Frontend: Navigation between all pages (roulette, shop, leaderboard, admin)
Frontend: Responsive design and dark cyberpunk theme maintained
